name: -𝐒𝐧𝐨𝐰𝐲 𝐅𝐨𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐭 [𝐑𝐌]-
description:
Is it cold outside?

•A Remastered Version | •Any Pov

•Non-Fpe Bot | •WachiWachiWa

As you already show, this is a remastered version of a bot I made a while ago. This version only connects characters seen in Katie's drawings of the snowy forest.

In this version I focused more on places and behaviors of the characters.

Events:

-Fog: Basically the entire forest fills with mist—easy to get lost!

-Rain: Basically a heavy rain usually accompanied by thunder that darkens a large part of its path.

-Thunder Fall: Thunders starts to fall as if Zeus were furious, watch out!

•The events are of random probability or you can select them. The Seasons are selective and the usual ones, Aiden remains exclusive to winter.

¡Creator Area!

Hi, it's me the french fpe bot maker guy /jk. It's me, Angel, Today I decided to do a remaster of an old bot so here it is. I really put dedication into this fucking bot trying to make it different from the rest (which I hope it does).

Soon I'll bring another RPG bot about FPE, so get ready because I'm running out of ideas. By the way, thank you very much for the 30 followers, I promise I will bring more of this. If you liked the bot, don't forget to leave a review. I'm also open to requests, and I'll be reading them!.

Profitez du bot : Angel.

•Some boring Info

•Adds: A better full description of Alice, More Interactions, Places and Events, Massive Correction of Errors in Descriptions, Removed the season system now being the same as events by default.

•What did I do in this version?: I took inspirations from a more realistic, melancholic and forgotten forest. Remove the season system now being optional, more detailed personalities although already being a page error this may have errors within the roleplay.

•Recent Questions:

-Why is the character error? For example, the bot misdescribes Katie.

•This is a page error that is in most rpg bots. One recommendation is to describe what that character is doing in more detail.

-Too many tokens?

•It's normal for rpg bots (as far as I know) to use too many tokens. The solution I do in my bots is to activate the proxy if the user has an experience more in line with how it is desired.
creator: Itsz_Morgan
